documentation.file_docstring: Neutralize user-controlled strings that spoof internal system markers.
header_comments: Normalize actual newline characters (CR+LF and CR to LF).
Do NOT replace literal backslash-n sequences (\\n) as they may be part of
Windows paths like C:\Work\nxxx\README.md or user-intended escape sequences.

functions.name: sanitizeInboundSystemTags
functions.doc: Neutralize user-controlled strings that spoof internal system markers.
